name: Sangen Furo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>燦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>封炉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フーロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, when a monster is destroyed by battle involving your FIRE Dragon monster: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters; Special Summon it to your field in Defense Position. During your opponent's End Phase: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 "Sangen" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Sangen Furo" once per turn.
eff: Once per turn, when a monster is destroyed by battle involving your FIRE Dragon monster: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters; Special Summon it to your field in Defense Position. During your opponent's End Phase: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 "Sangen" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Sangen Furo" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
